title: Departure and Arrival of Overseas Filipino Workers
content: This chapter outlines the procedures and regulations governing the departure and arrival of Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs). It includes requirements for documentation, pre-departure orientation seminars, and coordination with relevant government agencies to ensure the welfare and protection of OFWs during their travel to and from their overseas employment destinations.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
